title: Apply regulatory and quality requirements to the production of medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply regulatory and quality requirements to the production of medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify regulatory requirements for medicinal cannabis production
